description:

HDFC Click 2 Protect Life vs ICICI iProtect Smart Plan - Which is Better Term Plan in 2024 
If you are looking for a term insurance plan that offers comprehensive coverage and flexibility, you might be interested in comparing HDFC Click 2 Protect Life and ICICI iProtect Smart Plan. These are two popular term insurance products from HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential, respectively. In this video, we will compare these plans based on their features, benefits, premiums, claim settlement ratios, and customer reviews. We will also highlight the pros and cons of each plan and help you decide which one suits your needs better.

HDFC Click 2 Protect Life is a term insurance plan that offers four options: Life, Extra Life, Income, and Income Plus. You can also customize your HDFC Term Insurance plan with various riders, such as accidental death benefit, critical illness cover, waiver of premium, and income benefit on accidental disability. 

ICICI iProtect Smart Plan is a term insurance plan that offers four payout options: Lump Sum, Income, Increasing Income, and Lump Sum plus Income. You can also enhance your ICICI Term Insurance with various benefits, such as accidental death benefit, critical illness cover, waiver of premium on permanent disability, and terminal illness cover.

Both Term Insurance plans have their own advantages and disadvantages, depending on your preferences and requirements. To know more about the details and differences of these plans, watch the full video and don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe to our channel.
